entities.description: Major crop whose global yield is reduced by climate change

entities.name: TEMPERATE CEREAL CROPS
entities.description: Crops used as an example for the effectiveness of robust seed systems

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable and nutritious food

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A condition affecting one in three people worldwide, which SDG 2 aims to end

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: A condition causing yield reductions in major crops and extreme weather events

entities.name: EXTREME WEATHER EVENTS
entities.description: Environmental occurrences that jeopardize future food security

entities.name: DISEASE/PEST DYNAMICS
entities.description: Changing patterns of pests and diseases that jeopardize food security

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Living organisms or pathogens that crops must withstand

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors that crops must withstand

entities.name: LOW-LATITUDE REGIONS
entities.description: Geographic areas where climate change-induced yield reductions are more pronounced

entities.name: SEED SYSTEM
entities.description: A system for delivering improved cultivars to adapt agriculture to climate change

entities.name: SEED INPUT SUPPLY SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems designed to increase incomes for developing world farmers

entities.name: PRODUCTION AND HARVESTING TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technologies used to increase farmer incomes and improve consumer products

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of creating high-yielding, nutritious crops to achieve food security

entities.name: SPEED BREEDING
entities.description: An innovative breeding technique that accelerates the breeding cycle

entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: A technique that facilitates more precise genetic combinations in crops

entities.name: GENOME EDITING
entities.description: A technique that enables precise genetic changes in crops

entities.name: SDG 2
entities.description: The United Nations’ Sustainable Development Goal of Zero Hunger

entities.name: ZERO HUNGER
entities.description: The goal of ending malnutrition and achieving food security by 2030

entities.name: HIGH-YIELDING
entities.description: A trait of crops created through improvement to ensure food security

entities.name: NUTRITIOUS
entities.description: A trait of crops created through improvement to ensure food security
